violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-Freezer was not cleaned as frequently as required.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material Spray bottles in cleaning rack were not clearly identified to indicated contents.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The prep cooler that kept the toppings for burgers and sandwiches at the end of the food line had products temping between 56 and 63 degrees. This cooler is not maintaining temperature below 41 degrees. Products that were TCS foods were discarded.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Containers of coleslaw, pea and cheese salad, were dated use by 11/10/25. These products were. It discarded as required after the 11/10/25 date.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. A hood system was not provided for the Presto fryer in the kitchen.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Laminate was missing on the shelf above the microwave in the kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling and lights around the vent in the kitchen need to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
